message: Operator 'anchor-object-class' is tested with '^desireds.desired.on' on the apply side, but no rule in the project creates '^desireds' on it. This rule can never match.
Operator 'anchor-object-class' is tested with '^desireds.desired.in' on the apply side, but no rule in the project creates '^desireds' on it. This rule can never match.
